response.justification: Strong engineering craftsman with excellent software practices and 16+ years of experience, but critically misaligned for this C++ industrial automation role. Only 6 months of C++ experience (2014-2015) followed by 10+ years in web/cloud development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang). No industrial automation, IoT, IEC 62443, or secure development lifecycle expertise. Would require extensive ramp-up in C++, embedded systems, and domain-specific security standards.
strengths: Proven expertise in software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring) and architectural thinking across complex systems
Experience with high-performance, low-latency systems and async concurrency patterns (though in DLang, not C++)
Cloud platform exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and full-stack capability across web, mobile, and distributed systems
concerns: Insufficient C++ depth—only 6 months at National Instruments over 10 years ago; recent decade focused on TypeScript/Node.js, not C++
No industrial automation, IoT, or embedded systems background; entire career is web, GIS, and fintech-focused, with no exposure to IEC 62443, MQTT, or industrial protocols
No evidence of secure development lifecycle practices, industrial cybersecurity knowledge, or secure C++ coding in manufacturing/control contexts

key_factors.factor: Software engineering rigor and architectural capability
